mapper.sql: coachClassShipId, coachId, classId, classFee, lowestClass, classStatus, createdDate
mapper.insert: insert into coach_class_ship (coachClassShipId, coachId, classId, classFee, lowestClass, classStatus, createdDate) values (#{coachClassShipId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{coachId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{classId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{classFee,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{lowestClass,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{classStatus,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

insert into coach_class_ship
coachClassShipId,
coachId,
classId,
classFee,
lowestClass,
classStatus,
createdDate,
#{coachClassShipId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{coachId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{classId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{classFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{lowestClass,jdbcType=TINYINT},
#{classStatus,jdbcType=TINYINT},
#{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update coach_class_ship
coachId = #{coachId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
classId = #{classId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
classFee = #{classFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
lowestClass = #{lowestClass,jdbcType=TINYINT},
classStatus = #{classStatus,jdbcType=TINYINT},
createdDate = #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where coachClassShipId = #{coachClassShipId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update coach_class_ship set coachId = #{coachId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, classId = #{classId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, classFee = #{classFee,jdbcType=INTEGER}, lowestClass = #{lowestClass,jdbcType=TINYINT}, classStatus = #{classStatus,jdbcType=TINYINT}, createdDate = #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where coachClassShipId = #{coachClassShipId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: SELECT *from coach_class_ship WHERE coachId = #{coachId} AND classId=#{classId}
SELECT coachClassShipId, coachId, classId, classFee, lowestClass, classStatus, createdDate FROM coach_class_ship WHERE coachId = #{coachId} ORDER BY classFee ASC
